## 12-2. derived value ?⑦꽩 沅뚯옣 (9~10?④퀎 ?뺤젙)

`useEffect`?먯꽌 珥덇린媛??숆린?붾? ?꾪빐 `setState`瑜?吏곸젒 ?몄텧?섏? ?딅뒗?? 媛?ν븳 寃쎌슦 ?ъ슜??紐낆떆 ?좏깮媛믨낵 ?몃? ?곗씠???뚯뒪瑜?寃고빀??`useMemo`濡?derived value瑜?留뚮뱺??

```tsx
// 沅뚯옣 ?⑦꽩 (App.tsx??selectedRegionCode 泥섎━ ??
const [userSelectedRegionCode, setUserSelectedRegionCode] = useState<string>("");
const { regions: serviceRegions } = useRegionList();

const defaultRegionCode = serviceRegions[0]?.regionCode ?? "";
const selectedRegionCode = useMemo(() => {
  if (
    userSelectedRegionCode.length > 0 &&
    serviceRegions.some((r) => r.regionCode === userSelectedRegionCode)
  ) {
    return userSelectedRegionCode;
  }
  return defaultRegionCode;
}, [defaultRegionCode, serviceRegions, userSelectedRegionCode]);
```

```ts
function normalizeEnumValue(value: string | null): string | null {

  return value.trim().toLowerCase();
}
```

**`buildRegionSummaryMartReal` 援ъ“ (thin wrapper)**:

```ts
export function buildRegionSummaryMartReal(input: {
  adminCodes: CleanedRegionCodeRecord[];
  schoolMaster: MasterSchoolRecord[];
}): MartBuildResult {
  const regionMaster = input.adminCodes.map(adminToRegionMaster);
  return buildRegionSummaryMart({
    regionMaster,
    demandMaster: [],
    schoolMaster: input.schoolMaster,
    supportCenterMaster: [],
  });
}
```

```ts
function mapMartToRegionSummary(record: EtlMartRegionRecord): RegionSummary {
  return {
    regionCode: record.regionCode,
    regionCodeType: record.regionCodeType as RegionCodeType,
    sidoCode: record.sidoCode,
    sigunguCode: record.sigunguCode,
    regionName:
      record.regionName ?? deriveRegionName(record.sidoName, record.sigunguName),
    schoolCount: record.schoolCount,          // ??Block C ?붾㈃ 諛섏쁺 ?듭떖
    specialEducationStudentCount: record.specialEducationStudentCount,
    registeredDisabledCount: record.registeredDisabledCount,
    partialRegionFlag: record.partialRegionFlag,
  };
}
```

```ts
async fetchRegionByCode(regionCode) {
  // 1?④퀎: mart.real 留ㅼ묶 (schoolCount ?ы븿 region 諛섑솚 媛??
  const martRegions = await loadEtlMartRegions();

    if (martMatch) return martMatch;
  }
  // 2?④퀎: admin_codes 留ㅼ묶 (1李?28 ??schoolCount ?놁쓬)
  const adminRegions = await loadEtlRegions();
  if (adminRegions !== null) {
    const adminMatch = adminRegions.find((r) => r.regionCode === regionCode);
    if (adminMatch) return adminMatch;
  }
  // 3?④퀎: mockAdapter.fetchRegionByCode (DEMO-SIGUNGU-* ?몄텧 ??mock?먯꽌 李얘린, KOSTAT
  //         ?대씪 mock???놁쑝硫??먯뿰?ㅻ읇寃?undefined). DEMO ??KOSTAT hardcoded mapping
  //         誘몃룄??(짠17.7 ?뺤콉 洹몃?濡?.
  return mockAdapter.fetchRegionByCode(regionCode);
}
```

**`App.tsx` boundary 遺꾧린 (1李?46 짠3)**:

```tsx
// App.tsx
const isEtlMode = import.meta.env.VITE_DATA_SOURCE === "etl";
const isPrecomputedActive =
  isEtlMode && dashboardData.demoTransitionIndex !== undefined;

const displayedRegions = useMemo<RegionData[]>(() => {
  if (serviceRegions.length === 0) {
    return legacyRegions;
  }
  return toRegionDataList({
    regions: serviceRegions,
    selectedRegionCode,
    selectedRegionCalculated: dashboardData.calculatedTransitionIndex,
    selectedRegionPrecomputed: isEtlMode
      ? dashboardData.demoTransitionIndex
      : undefined,
    selectedRegionPrecomputedPartial: isPrecomputedActive ? true : undefined,  // ??1李?46 ?좉퇋
    legacyFallbackRegions: legacyRegions,
  });
}, [
  serviceRegions,
  selectedRegionCode,
  dashboardData.calculatedTransitionIndex,
  dashboardData.demoTransitionIndex,
  isEtlMode,
  isPrecomputedActive,
]);
```

```tsx
// src/App.tsx (1李?105 ?좉퇋 ?쇱씤)
import { buildGapTrendSignal } from "./lib/scenario/buildGapTrendSignal";
import { buildScenarioReport } from "./lib/scenario/buildScenarioReport";
import type { /* ..., */ GapTrendSignal, ScenarioReport, /* ... */ } from "./types";

// 湲곗〈 routeCandidates useMemo (1李?101) 吏곹썑
const gapTrendSignals = useMemo<GapTrendSignal[]>(
  () => buildGapTrendSignal(selectedRegion),
  [selectedRegion],
);

const scenarioReport = useMemo<ScenarioReport>(
  () =>
    buildScenarioReport({
      scenario: studentScenario,
      trendSignals: gapTrendSignals,
      routeCandidates,
    }),
  [studentScenario, gapTrendSignals, routeCandidates],
);

// 1李?105 prop ?꾨떖
<GeneratedOutputs scenarioReport={scenarioReport} />
```

```typescript
export interface DeriveSchoolSigunguSummary {
  total: number;
  derivedCount: number;     // address tokens[1]濡?sigunguName ?덈줈 ?뚯깮??record ??

}

}
```

**runEtl.ts ?곌껐 ?뺤콉 (1李?125 짠3)**:

```typescript
// runRealMasterStage ?대?
const schoolsFile = readJson<{
  _meta?: { source?: string };
  records: CleanedSchoolForMaster[];
}>(schoolsPath);

const schoolsSource = schoolsFile._meta?.source ?? "";
const isNeisSource = schoolsSource.startsWith("real:neis-");
let schoolsForMaster: CleanedSchoolForMaster[] = schoolsFile.records;
if (isNeisSource) {
  const derived = deriveSchoolSigunguFromAddress(schoolsFile.records);
  schoolsForMaster = derived.records;
  console.log(
    `[real:master:B/schools] NEIS sigunguName ?뚯깮 ??total=${derived.summary.total} derived=${derived.summary.derivedCount} unchanged=${derived.summary.unchangedCount} unresolved=${derived.summary.unresolvedCount}`,
  );
}

const schoolResult = buildSchoolMasterReal({
  schools: schoolsForMaster,
  adminCodes: adminFile.records,
});
```

**1李?159 builder ?곌껐 ?뺤콉 (짠5)**:

```typescript
// src/lib/scenario/buildRouteCandidates.ts (1李?159 蹂寃?遺遺?
import { selectRecommendationEvidence } from "../../data/recommendationEvidence";

// .map ?대?:
return scored.slice(0, limit).map(({ rec }) => {
  const routeType = deriveRouteType(rec, scenario);
  const evidence = selectRecommendationEvidence({
    routeType,
    programName: rec.programName,
  });
  return {
    candidateId: rec.id,
    title: rec.programName,
    routeType,
    whyThisFits: evidence
      ? evidence.whyThisFits
      : buildWhyThisFits(rec, scenario),
    requiredTeacherCheck: evidence
      ? [...evidence.teacherCheck]
      : [...DEFAULT_TEACHER_CHECK],
    familyDiscussionPoint: evidence
      ? [...evidence.familyDiscussion]
      : [...DEFAULT_FAMILY_DISCUSSION],
    officialResourceIds: [],
    limitations: evidence
      ? [...evidence.limitations]
      : [...DEFAULT_LIMITATIONS],
    regionCode: scenario.regionCode,
  };
});
```

**`getDisplayInstitutionHints` helper ?뺤콉 (1李?183 짠2)**:

```typescript
type InstitutionHint = NonNullable<RouteCandidate["institutionHints"]>[number];

interface InstitutionFilterContext {
  sidoName: string;
  sigunguName: string | null;
  thirdLevelName: string;
  sigunguCode: string | null;
  thirdLevelCode: string | null;
}

function getDisplayInstitutionHints(input: {
  institutionHints: InstitutionHint[] | undefined;
  detailedRegionContext: InstitutionFilterContext | undefined;
}): InstitutionHint[] {
  const { institutionHints, detailedRegionContext } = input;
  if (!institutionHints) return [];
  if (!detailedRegionContext) return institutionHints;
  return institutionHints.filter((h) => {
    if (h.sidoName !== detailedRegionContext.sidoName) return false;
    if (detailedRegionContext.sigunguName === null) return true;
    return h.sigunguName === detailedRegionContext.sigunguName;
  });
}
```
